approach: Tree-walking interpreter with 4 modules: Lexer (regex-based tokenizer with line/col tracking), Parser (recursive descent with precedence climbing for operators), Evaluator (AST walker with Environment scope chain supporting closures), and a CLI entry point. Supports integers, floats, strings, booleans, arrays, null, let/assignment, arithmetic/comparison/logical operators, if/else if/else, while, for, named and anonymous functions, closures, array indexing/mutation, and 6 built-in functions (print, len, push, type, str, int). Error messages include line and column numbers. All 29 tests pass including the map/filter validation scenario.
